ddls:
CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "netloc" TEXT /* The network location of the platform's website */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the freelance platform */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the freelance platform */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the platform based on certain metrics */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the platform (e.g., Clients, Freelancers) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of platform (e.g., Clients, Gigs) */,
  "affiliate_link" TEXT /* Affiliate link for the platform */,
  "screening" TEXT /* Screening process for users */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the platform was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the platform details were last updated */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Additional contact information for the platform */,
  "verification_process" TEXT /* Details about the verification process for users on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform the user belongs to */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., freelancer, client) */,
  "skills" TEXT /* Skills of the user */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* The user's password (hashed for security) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* The URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "background_check" INTEGER /* Whether the user has undergone a background check */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user's identity has been verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform where the project is listed */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who posted the project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget for the project */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Estimated duration of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Open, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., Fixed Price, Hourly) */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* The type of project (e.g., web development, content writing) */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* The skills required for the project */,
  "preferred_qualifications" TEXT /* Any preferred qualifications or experience for the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the project was posted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the project details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bids" (
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bid */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the bid is for */,
  "freelancer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the freelancer who placed the bid */,
  "proposal" TEXT /* Proposal submitted by the freelancer */,
  "bid_amount" REAL /* Amount bid by the freelancer */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Estimated duration to complete the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bid (e.g., Pending, Accepted, Rejected) */,
  "bid_status_updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the bid status was last updated */,
  "bid_amount_updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the bid amount was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_freelancer_id FOREIGN KEY ("freelancer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "affiliate_programs" (
  "affiliate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each affiliate program */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform offering the affiliate program */,
  "affiliate_link" TEXT /* Affiliate link for the program */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate offered to affiliates */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the affiliate program */,
  "program_terms" TEXT /* The terms and conditions of the affiliate program */,
  "program_requirements" TEXT /* Any requirements for joining the affiliate program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the affiliate program was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the affiliate program details were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("affiliate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_affiliate_programs_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic entry */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform the analytics are for */,
  "metric" TEXT /* The metric being recorded (e.g., User Engagement, Project Success Rate) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* The type of metric being recorded */,
  "platform_section" TEXT /* The section of the platform related to the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* The title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* The content of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who wrote the article */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the article was published */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the article was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referrals" (
  "referral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referral */,
  "referrer_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who made the referral */,
  "referred_user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who was referred */,
  "referral_date" TEXT /* The date when the referral was made */,
  "reward_status" TEXT /* Whether a reward was given for the referral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_referrer_id FOREIGN KEY ("referrer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referrals_referred_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("referred_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the project related to the payment */,
  "freelancer_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the freelancer who received the payment */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the client who made the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* The date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* The amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_freelancer_id FOREIGN KEY ("freelancer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the project related to the rating */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the client who gave the rating */,
  "freelancer_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the freelancer who received the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* The rating given */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Any feedback provided with the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_freelancer_id FOREIGN KEY ("freelancer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "messages" (
  "message_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the project related to the message */,
  "sender_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who sent the message */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who received the message */,
  "message" TEXT /* The content of the message */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the message was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_sender_id FOREIGN KEY ("sender_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_messages_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_verifications" (
  "verification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each verification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user being verified */,
  "verification_type" TEXT /* The type of verification */,
  "verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user's identity has been verified */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the verification was attempted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("verification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_verifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "badges" (
  "badge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each badge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user who earned the badge */,
  "badge_name" TEXT /* The name of the badge */,
  "badge_description" TEXT /* A description of the badge */,
  "earned_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the badge was earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("badge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_badges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
